notes:
# v0.4.1 — Auto-update endpoint moved to public mirror

Patch release. Fixes the auto-update endpoint for v0.4.0 by moving the update manifest to a public GitHub Pages mirror.

## Why

v0.4.0 hardcoded the updater endpoint to `https://github.com/barsan-yulau/ai-dev-tool/releases/latest/download/latest.json`. The source repo is private, so unauthenticated HTTPS requests to release assets return 404. The updater could never reach the manifest, so v0.4.0's auto-update functionality was non-functional.

v0.4.1 moves the endpoint to a separate, public mirror repository (`barsan-yulau/ai-dev-tool-releases`) served via GitHub Pages. Source code remains private; only the signed installer + manifest are published to the mirror.

## Changes

- **Endpoint**: `https://barsan-yulau.github.io/ai-dev-tool-releases/latest.json`
- **Source repo**: unchanged (private — `barsan-yulau/ai-dev-tool`)
- **Mirror repo**: new public repo `barsan-yulau/ai-dev-tool-releases` holds latest.json + signed MSIs + signatures + checksums
- **Signature trust chain**: unchanged. Same minisign keypair, same embedded pubkey, MSIs verifiable against published `.sig`

## Upgrading from v0.4.0

**Manual install required**, same as v0.3.0 → v0.4.0. The v0.4.0 builds installed in the wild cannot auto-update to v0.4.1 because their endpoint URL points at the unreachable private repo.

From v0.4.1 onward, all future releases will auto-install via the toast (see v0.4.0 release notes for the full flow).

## Installers

- `ai-dev-tool_0.4.1_x64_en-US.msi` — Windows MSI (minisign-signed; same key as v0.4.0)
- `ai-dev-tool_0.4.1_x64_en-US.msi.sig` — signature
- `ai-dev-tool_0.4.1_x64-setup.exe` — NSIS web/offline installer

## What's next

T2.0.10 — patch release v0.4.2 to verify the end-to-end auto-update flow against the new endpoint.
